title: astragalus forrestii
intro: Astragalus forrestii, also known as Forrest's milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family (Fabaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. The plant contains saponins and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus forrestii is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and preventing disease.
